final_prompt.prompt:
Design a premium minimalist logo wordmark for an architecture and interior design brand.

Style/medium: Minimalist geometric wordmark; timeless European design-bureau aesthetic; monochrome
Composition: Clean spacing; refined typographic layout; calm editorial feel
Subject: Uppercase wordmark "BAU" with sharp typography and subtle custom letter details
Scene/backdrop: No background elements; isolated mark
Lighting/mood: Modern, sophisticated, precise, high-end luxury editorial
Color palette: Monochrome — black and ivory
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim): BAU
Constraints: Architecture, interior design, and construction brand identity; flat vector logo
Avoid: House icons, tool icons, gradients, playful effects, decorative flourishes
